speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family collapse aur izzat loss ka soft mirror dena.
text: Tumhe yeh darr pakad raha hai ki agar tum sambhal na paaye toh ghar ka poora bharosa hil jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Har koi mujhse placement ki umeed kar raha hai, aur mujhe lagta hai main unko sirf sharminda karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement, Lens C se relational shame hold karna.
text: Logon ki umeed aur sharmindagi ka darr tumhe andar se daba raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: medical bill dekh kar toot gaya
text: Aaj medical bill dekh kar aur toot gaya, dimaag mein koi raasta hi nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement chains ke baad ek grounded question se core guilt-thought nikalna.
text: Jab tum bolte ho raasta nahi dikh raha, us pal sabse loud line kaunsi chalti hai - 'main fail ho gaya', ya 'maine sabko duba diya'?

speaker: Seeker
text: Zyada loud yahi hota hai ki maine sabko duba diya, main hi problem hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Sequential context mein guilt ke neeche belonging-loss aur helplessness reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai guilt ke neeche yeh dard hai ki tum apne logon ke kaam nahi aa pa rahe, jaise apni jagah hi fisal gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul, andar se khokhla lagta hai aur saans bhi tab bhaari ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guilt validate karke C4 family-pressure reality se jodna, worth ko outcome se alag karna.
text: Kirana loss, medical bill aur placement pressure ek saath aa jaye toh aisa guilt feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek result ya current crisis se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sirf nakami mehsoos ho rahi hai
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga, warna har waqt sirf nakami mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity gate maintain karte hue Lens B se duty-pressure mirror karna.
text: Tumhare andar yeh farz bahut loud hai ki placement laakar hi ghar ka bojh halka karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon, aaj raat aur kal subah ke liye simple steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar student-world anecdote se aspirational family guilt silence normalize karna.
text: Aspirational families ke students mein yeh pattern common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sab parivaar ko nirash na karne ka bojh leke chalte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi raasta hai kya jo 10 minute mein ho jaye aur yeh guilt loop dhila pade?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 duty-fit under-10-min options dena.
text: Teen chhote options: 1) paani + 6 slow exhale, 2) kal ka top 1 placement task ek line mein likho, 3) medical bill ke liye kal kis time kis se baat karni hai woh ek line note karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Top 1 task likh diya aur bill wali line bhi, dimaag thoda set lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen steps ko simple sequence mein execute karwana.
text: Pehle 6 slow exhale complete karo, phir notes mein wahi do lines dobara dekh lo, phir phone side rakh do. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans halka hua hai, pehle jaisa chest pressure nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 overload ko structural reframe dekar self-blame kam karna.
text: Jab income shock, medical bill aur placement pressure ek frame mein aa jaye, freeze aur guilt common structural response hota hai, personal failure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Guilt abhi hai, par kam tight hai, total flood jaisa nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro de-escalation ko validate karke progress reinforce karna.
text: Yeh clear progress hai - tum chaos se structure tak aaye ho. Isi tarah chhote steps se loop dheere padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah slip ka darr abhi bhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning relapse ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Subah teen anchors rakho: paani, 2 minute exhale, aur seedha top 1 placement task pe 8 minute timer. Baaki baad mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahta hoon, yeh manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Predictable micro-routine ka mechanism simple language mein batana.
text: Fixed next step se dimaag ko control ka signal milta hai, isliye guilt-flood dheere dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable feel ho raha hai, pehle jaisa gunehgaar wala pressure kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma/cost acknowledge karke optional support pathway non-forcing tarike se dena.
text: Agar kabhi wave phir heavy ho, pehle sirf campus support ya helpline ka contact save rakho. Stigma aur paise dono real hote hain, isliye pehla step bas backup rakhna bhi kaafi hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, contact save kar lunga, zarurat padi toh use karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Preparedness aur agency ko reinforce karna.
text: Yeh practical decision hai. Jab backup ready hota hai toh pressure ka half weight utar jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ab manageable lag rahi hai, neend aane ki chance lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sleep close ke liye 3 no-extra-load micro actions dena.
text: Sone se pehle mini routine: paani, 6 slow exhale, aur subah ka top 1 step ek baar dekh ke phone side. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Routine kar lunga, yeh simple hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Consistency reinforce karna aur slip ko normalise karna.
text: Beech mein slip ho bhi jaye toh woh failure nahi, sirf ek wave hai. Tumhare paas ab reset ka clear tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab sambhalne layak lag raha hai, sirf nakami mehsoos ho rahi hai wala loop kam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein guilt flood se structured control shift reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum guilt-flood se chhote clear actions tak aaye ho, yeh strong recovery shift hai. Crisis real hai, lekin tumhari keemat is crisis se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas aankhon ke aage andhera sa hai aur main react bhi nahi kar paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par Lens F se numb-overwhelm quality mirror karna bina stressor push kiye.
text: Jo tum feel kar rahe ho usme wave itni heavy hai ki system numb mode mein chala gaya lagta hai, jaise sab kuch freeze ho gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Haan, dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, log bolte hain plan banao par main blank ho jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se freeze state ki continuity mirror karna.
text: Kaafi dino se yeh pattern chal raha hai - sochna chahte ho, par dimaag turant blank zone mein chala jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saari savings medical bill mein khatam ho gayi, uske baad se MNC ka sapna bhi fake lagne laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared future collapse ko softly mirror karna.
